description: Approval task timeline for a given leave request process instance, sourced from SmartEngine's se_task_instance. Consumed by the wd_leave_request_detail page sub-table.
fromSql: SELECT CAST(t.id AS VARCHAR) AS pid, t.process_definition_activity_id AS "nodeId", t.title AS "taskName", t.claim_user_id AS assignee, t.status AS status, t.comment AS comment, t.gmt_create AS "startedAt", t.complete_time AS "completedAt" FROM se_task_instance t WHERE t.tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND t.process_instance_id = CAST(#{params.processInstanceId} AS BIGINT) ORDER BY t.gmt_create ASC
